Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Now things are getting exciting! Get 'im, Amada![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We heard you guys were gonna have a match, so we came to witness it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}These kinds of things need an audience, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}We heard you two were going to have a match. We're just here to witness it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That's right, we're here to watch the little dude shine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}When I told them I wanted to beat you, they all offered to help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I set up a training routine for him, and gave him advice on his movements.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I also wanted to build my legs and core, so I've been going on runs with Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And I took on the role of bein' you for practice matches.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}We figured if he couldn't land a hit on Junpei, then beating you would be out of the question.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Wha— Hey, spare a thought for the guy covered in bruises over here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Man, he really didn't hold back anything on me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}You're doin' good, Amada! Keep it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You can do this, just take it half a step further![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Hey, are you guys up there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Aw, yeah! That's a clean hit! The winner is Amada, in the blue corner![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I just got lucky. Plus, I did kind of cheat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}No, you saw a window of opportunity and you took it. That's something to be proud of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Fuuka and I bought some roasted sweet potatoes. I was looking for everyone to come eat with us, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}We're witnessing a showdown between men. Right, Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}It sounds kinda weird when you put it like that... But yeah, I guess so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}It was a great match, on both sides.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I don't really get it, but it sounds like you're having fun. It's cold though, so you should head inside soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Oh wait, did you say sweet potatoes!? Count me in![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I bought them for Amada-kun! Junpei, you can have the skin and the burnt parts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Thanks for the match, {f 4 1}-san. I learned a lot from it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}No, I just got lucky. I was stuck on the defensive that whole time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}But I think I did do better than our last fight. Now, I just need to apply this to a real battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}It was just luck. I was stuck on the defensive that whole time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Guess I still have a long way to go. You really are amazing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}If we do one more round, I'll definitely lose.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}I just got lucky. You really are amazing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Technically, we're tied one-to-one now, so the next match decides the real winner... Not sure I actually have a chance though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}But I hope you'll let me challenge you again some time. You gotta promise, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Okay. Then until that time comes, will you hold on to this for me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}That's... the key to the house I lived in with my mom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}Whenever I look at it, I remember the time I spent with her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}That house is filled with all kinds of memories we shared together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}I know the final battle isn't going to be easy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}But no matter what, I want to come back here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}I feel like this key will connect us to each other.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}And I hope someday... maybe I can be that person someone can always come back to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}Just like how Mom, and everyone at the dorm, was there for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}...Ah, sorry for talking for so long. Shall we go down and have some sweet potatoes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}So our next match would be next year? Or maybe even longer than that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}I know! How about once I reach the same height as you?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}And if we're around the same build, I might stand a chance. Oh, but you'll probably be even stronger by then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}When that time comes, I wonder what everyone will be like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}It's exciting just thinking about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada was beaming with happiness[n]as we went to join the others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You have forged a powerful bond with Amada! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Michael{f 0 1 27}, the protector of all![n]{f 1 1}
